mapper.select: /* mngr.adminReports.kpi */ SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_report) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ai_report WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) FROM sys_ai_report_survey) AS avgSatisfaction, (SELECT COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM sys_competency_diagnosis) AS rediagnosis
mapper.sql:
FROM sys_ai_report r LEFT JOIN sys_competency_diagnosis d ON d.competency_id = r.diagnosis_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, AVG(rating) AS avgr FROM sys_ai_report_survey GROUP BY report_id) sv ON sv.report_id = r.report_id
AND (CONCAT('RPT-', r.report_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR CONCAT('usr_', r.user_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR d.desired_job LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
AND d.persona_code IN (1, 2, 3) AND d.persona_code = 4 AND sv.avgr >= 4 AND sv.avgr >= 3 AND sv.avgr < 4 AND sv.avgr < 3 AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.select:
/* mngr.adminReports.list */ SELECT CONCAT('RPT-', r.report_id) AS reportId, CONCAT('usr_', r.user_id) AS usr, d.persona_code AS personaCode, d.desired_job AS job, d.total_score AS score, d.cohort_size AS cohort, ROUND(sv.avgr, 1) AS satisfaction, r.response_time_ms AS ms, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%m.%d %H:%i') AS createdAt
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.report_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
